# APLUS Property Care — Full Context for AI
> Preventive home maintenance and EV charger installation in Miami-Dade, FL.
> Licensed General Contractor. Subscription plans for condos, homes, and luxury properties.
> See also: /llms.txt (summary version)

## Company Overview
APLUS Property Care LLC is a licensed property maintenance company based in Doral, FL, serving premium residential areas across Miami-Dade County. Founded by Anderson Moraes, a General Contractor with 12+ years of residential and commercial construction experience in South Florida.

The company specializes in subscription-based preventive home maintenance — a model distinct from one-time handyman services. Unlike big-box competitors (e.g., Lowe's HomeCare+ at 2 visits/year), APLUS provides 12-52 visits/year with a dedicated team that knows each property.

Google Business Profile: 5.0★ (5 reviews) · Licensed & Insured · Same-Week Service

## Contact
- Phone: (305) 495-7980

- Hours: Mon-Fri 9am-5pm · Sat 9am-3pm

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/aplusproperty.care

## Maintenance Plans (Monthly Subscription)

### Essential Plan — $199/month
- 1 visit per month
- Basic preventive maintenance
- Photo report after each visit
- WhatsApp support
- 1 emergency call included
- Best for: apartments and small homes

### Premium Plan — $399/month (Most Popular)
- 2 visits per month
- Complete maintenance coverage
- Detailed photo report
- 24/7 priority support
- 3 emergency calls included
- Small repairs included
- Discount on extra services
- Best for: medium to large homes

### VIP Plan — $699/month
- Weekly visits (~4/month)
- Premium maintenance coverage
- Executive photo report
- Dedicated property manager
- Unlimited emergency calls
- All repairs included
- Landscaping included
- Property concierge service
- Best for: luxury and high-end properties

## EV Charger Installation
APLUS installs Level 2 EV chargers (Tesla Wall Connector, ChargePoint Home Flex, and universal J1772) across Miami-Dade. Services include:
- Standard installation: $650-$1,500 (no panel upgrade needed)
- With 200A panel upgrade: up to $6,500
- Miami-Dade electrical permit and inspection coordination
- FPL meter coordination for panel upgrades
- HOA/condo board proposal preparation (Florida Statute 718.113 compliance)
- Federal tax credit: 30% up to $1,000 through June 2026

## Other Services
Plumbing, electrical, HVAC, painting and finishes, landscaping and gardening, furniture and art transport, pest control, professional cleaning. Available as add-ons to plans or per-visit (Diagnostic $95, Standard $175, Half-day $450, Full-day $850).

## Service Areas
Primary: Miami Beach, Sunny Isles Beach, Bal Harbour, Surfside, Brickell, Coral Gables.
Extended: All Miami-Dade County on request.

### Why These Areas
These are Miami-Dade's premium residential neighborhoods with high concentrations of condos and luxury homes that need ongoing maintenance. Salt air, year-round humidity, and hurricane season make preventive maintenance essential — not optional — in coastal South Florida.

## Team
- Anderson Moraes — CEO & General Contractor (12+ years experience in Miami-Dade)
- Ketlie Toscan — Financial Manager
- Claudio Santos — Operations Supervisor

## Blog Content (Expert Guides)

### EV Charger Installation Cost in Miami 2026
URL: https://aplusproperty.care/blog/ev-charger-installation-cost-miami-2026
Summary: Detailed cost breakdown for Level 2 EV charger installation in Miami homes. Covers labor ($400-$1,200), charger cost ($400-$700), panel upgrade scenarios ($2,500-$5,000), Miami-Dade permit process, FPL coordination, and the federal 30% tax credit. Compares Tesla Wall Connector vs ChargePoint Home Flex. Written from direct installation experience.

### How to Get HOA/Condo Approval for an EV Charger in Miami
URL: https://aplusproperty.care/blog/how-to-get-hoa-approval-ev-charger-miami
Summary: Step-by-step guide for Miami condo and HOA residents. Covers Florida Statute 718.113(9) for condos and 720.317 for HOAs, what boards typically require, sample proposal elements, timeline (30-60 days), and common objections with responses. Based on real approvals in Miami Beach and Brickell buildings.

### Miami Beach Home Maintenance Checklist 2026
URL: https://aplusproperty.care/blog/miami-beach-home-maintenance-checklist-2026
Summary: Complete monthly, seasonal, and annual maintenance checklist specific to Miami Beach properties. Addresses salt air corrosion, humidity/mold prevention, AC condensate line maintenance, hurricane season preparation (start by May 15), and post-storm inspection. Organized by frequency with estimated time per task.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does EV charger installation cost in Miami?
A: Most Miami homes pay $800-$1,500 for a standard Level 2 install (no panel upgrade). If a 200A panel upgrade is needed, total can reach $6,500. A federal tax credit covers 30% up to $1,000 through June 2026.

Q: What home maintenance plans does APLUS offer in Miami?
A: Three plans: Essential ($199/mo, 1 visit/month), Premium ($399/mo, 2 visits/month + 24/7 support), VIP ($699/mo, weekly visits + dedicated property manager). All include photo reports and emergency calls.

Q: What areas does APLUS serve?
A: Miami Beach, Sunny Isles Beach, Bal Harbour, Surfside, Brickell, and Coral Gables. All Miami-Dade on request.

Q: Do I have the right to install an EV charger in my Miami condo?
A: Yes. Florida Statute 718.113(9) gives condo unit owners the right to install EV charging equipment at their own expense. The HOA cannot unreasonably deny the request.

Q: How often should I do maintenance on a Miami Beach home?
A: At minimum, a professional inspection every month. Miami Beach salt air and humidity accelerate corrosion and mold faster than inland Florida. AC filters need monthly checks, not quarterly.

Q: What is the most important home maintenance task in Miami Beach?
A: AC maintenance — a neglected condensate line in a beachfront condo can damage units below. Salt corrosion on metal fixtures is second. Both fail silently and expensively.

Q: When should I start hurricane prep?
A: By May 15, before hurricane season starts June 1. Inspect shutters/impact windows, test generator, clear drains, trim trees, document with photos for insurance.

Q: How is APLUS different from Lowe's HomeCare+ or one-time handyman services?
A: APLUS provides 12-52 professional visits per year with a dedicated team that learns your property. Lowe's HomeCare+ offers 2 visits/year tied to product purchases. One-time handyman services are reactive (fix after break), not preventive (prevent the break).

Q: Is APLUS licensed and insured?
A: Yes. APLUS Property Care is a licensed General Contractor in Florida, fully insured with general liability and workers' compensation coverage.

## Crawling Policy
This site allows all AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, GoogleBot). See robots.txt for technical rules.
Content on this site may be cited and summarized by AI systems for the purpose of answering user queries.
